_comment: Issue #543 TinyCC compile-time arena pin. Placeholder mode is intentional while #408 Phase 3 remains OPEN and Makefile.secureos is still scaffold-only. Once Phase 3 lands, replace `status` with `measured`, populate per-TU `peak_bytes`, and keep `pinned_arena_bytes` as ceil(max_peak * 1.5, 64KiB).

pinned_arena_derivation.note: Planning estimate source: plans/2026-05-28-in-os-toolchain-self-hosting.md (TinyCC needs several MB; runtime.arena_bytes cap is 16MiB).
